result.stdout:
Usage: csc-manager <Command>

Commands:
  enable            Enables csc to process internal access
  disable           Disable csc not to process internal access any more
  enable-vscode     Enables csc to process internal access of Visual Studio Code
  disable-vscode    Disable csc of VsCode not to process internal access any more
  enable-dotnet     Enable all dotnet roslyn compiler to process internal access
  disable-dotnet    Disable all dotnet roslyn compiler not to process internal access any more
  download          Download csc files from nuget
  generate          Download csc files from nuget and Enable it

commands.payload:
Usage: csc-manager <Command>

Commands:
  enable            Enables csc to process internal access
  disable           Disable csc not to process internal access any more
  enable-vscode     Enables csc to process internal access of Visual Studio Code
  disable-vscode    Disable csc of VsCode not to process internal access any more
  enable-dotnet     Enable all dotnet roslyn compiler to process internal access
  disable-dotnet    Disable all dotnet roslyn compiler not to process internal access any more
  download          Download csc files from nuget
  generate          Download csc files from nuget and Enable it

result.stdout:
Usage: csc-manager disable [options...]

Disable csc not to process internal access any more

Options:
  -directory <String>    Directory contains Microsoft.CodeAnalysis.CSharp.dll (Default: )
  -path <String>         Microsoft.CodeAnalysis.CSharp.dll path (Default: )

Usage: csc-manager download <Extended directory directory

The folder shall be cleared at the first step.> [options...]

Download csc files from nuget

Options:
  -version <String>    C# Compiler Version (Default: 3.4.0)
